title: Day Shift Logistics Coordinator (Jurong)
description:
Job Summary

Plan and coordinate delivery operations to drive timely, efficient, and safe fulfilment of shipments. Lead vehicle deployment and loading supervision while proactively resolving transit issues to ensure seamless delivery execution.

Responsibilities

  • Plan and optimize daily delivery routes to achieve timely and cost-effective fulfilment of shipments
  • Coordinate deployment of delivery vehicles and drivers aligned with operational demands
  • Supervise on-site loading operations to ensure accurate handling, compliance with safety standards, and loading efficiency
  • Identify and resolve exceptions related to loading or delivery promptly to minimise operational disruptions
  • Track delivery vehicles during transit and proactively address in-transit issues to reduce delays
  • Collaborate with warehouse, operations, and customer-facing teams to ensure smooth execution of delivery schedules
  • Execute additional operational tasks as assigned by supervisors to support overall logistics performance

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification
  • 1–2 years of experience in transport coordination, fleet management, or logistics operations
  • Basic computer proficiency to support operational tracking and coordination
  • Strong coordination and execution skills demonstrated in fast-paced environments
  • Ability to work effectively under pressure while adapting to operational changes
  • Responsible and hands-on attitude with a willingness to learn and grow

Working Hours

  • Day Shift: 10am – 7pm

*Working hours may be adjusted based on operational needs

Work Location

  • Jurong, Singapore

At GreenLane Talent Acquisition, we redefine the recruitment experience for both clients and job seekers. As a leading talent acquisition partner, we specialize in connecting top-tier professionals with leading companies. Our comprehensive approach covers everything from precise position identification to seamless onboarding, ensuring a perfect fit for both employers and candidates.


For job seekers, GreenLane is more than a recruitment agency; we are your career advocate. Our team is dedicated to understanding your unique skills, aspirations, and preferences, guiding you towards opportunities that align with your career goals. We believe in the transformative power of exceptional talent, and we are here to support you in achieving your professional ambitions.


Whether you are an employer seeking top talent or a job seeker looking for the next career move, GreenLane Talent Acquisition is your trusted partner on the journey to success.
